_metadata.workstream: Success Criteria — Spearheaded by Auracelle WinterStorm2030
_metadata.context: Gap identified in inaugural SAS-219 session: how do we write down success criteria and how do we meet them?

five_approaches.name: Backwards-Engineered Tangibles
five_approaches.description: Define success by identifying exactly what decision-makers need from the wargame output, then design criteria that confirm those outputs were delivered. Inverts typical practice — grounds success in decision-maker utility, not activity metrics.

five_approaches.name: Threshold-Based Governance Observables
five_approaches.description: Define success as achieving specific observable governance behaviors during scenario execution — binary, scenario-linked, directly tied to wargame design intent.

five_approaches.name: Comparative Actor Improvement (g-GWC Delta)
five_approaches.description: Define success as measurable improvement in governance capacity scores across wargame cycles — particularly for CD and ASI domains where baseline scores are lowest.

five_approaches.name: Research Question Insight Quality
five_approaches.description: Define success not just as RQ coverage but as the novelty and actionability of insights generated per RQ. Not 'did we address RQ3' but 'did RQ3 analysis produce an insight that changes how we think?'

five_approaches.name: Institutional Adoption Rate
five_approaches.description: Define success by whether wargame outputs are adopted in real institutional processes — exercises, doctrine reviews, capability planning, policy documents. The ultimate downstream criterion.

generic_sas219_kpis.name: Wargame Cycle Completion Rate
generic_sas219_kpis.definition: % of planned tabletop/wargame iterations completed on schedule within the 2026–2028 roadmap

generic_sas219_kpis.name: Scenario Fidelity Score
generic_sas219_kpis.definition: Expert panel assessment of how accurately scenario design reflects current High North operating environment realities
generic_sas219_kpis.measurement_method: Post-scenario expert survey compared to open-source assessments

generic_sas219_kpis.name: Research Question Coverage Index
generic_sas219_kpis.definition: % of SAS-219's five formal Research Questions addressed by scenario outputs in each wargame cycle
generic_sas219_kpis.measurement_method: Post-game debrief mapping outputs to RQ1–RQ5

generic_sas219_kpis.name: Panel Participation and Contribution Rate
generic_sas219_kpis.definition: % of panel members contributing substantive analytical outputs per annual cycle

generic_sas219_kpis.name: Decision-Maker Utility Rating
generic_sas219_kpis.definition: Post-wargame assessment by NATO/DoD/MoD audience of whether outputs improved understanding of High North decision challenges
generic_sas219_kpis.measurement_method: Anonymous post-event survey; tracked across wargame cycles

winterstorm2030_kpis.name: Governance Baseline Coverage
winterstorm2030_kpis.definition: % of Arctic actors with fully scored g-GWC profiles across all 8 BGC domains including CD, measured through the E-IAIG-HT scoring instrument and Auracelle WinterStorm2030
winterstorm2030_kpis.threshold: 100% actor coverage before first wargame cycle
winterstorm2030_kpis.measurement_method: E-IAIG-HT scoring instrument; Auracelle WinterStorm2030 platform
winterstorm2030_kpis.correction_note: Measured through Auracelle WinterStorm2030, not Auracelle Bach

winterstorm2030_kpis.name: CD Scenario Activation Rate
winterstorm2030_kpis.definition: % of wargame scenario injects that activate at least one CD-NOF observable, enabling measurement of cognitive domain governance performance in play
winterstorm2030_kpis.measurement_method: CD-NOF tracking in WinterStorm2030 scenario inject library

winterstorm2030_kpis.name: Governance Seam Identification Yield
winterstorm2030_kpis.definition: Number of new adversarially exploitable governance seams identified per wargame cycle through comparative g-GWC analysis using the Governance_Gap() metric
winterstorm2030_kpis.measurement_method: Post-game governance seam analysis; Governance_Gap() metric output

winterstorm2030_kpis.name: Bayesian/Kalman Tracking Fidelity
winterstorm2030_kpis.definition: Correlation between dynamic g-GWC score trajectories (Kalman-tracked during live play) and post-hoc expert assessment of actor governance performance
winterstorm2030_kpis.measurement_method: Post-game model validation; methodology working paper reporting

winterstorm2030_kpis.name: Backwards-Engineering Success Rate
winterstorm2030_kpis.definition: % of wargame tangibles traceable back to a formally stated decision-maker requirement identified before scenario design began
winterstorm2030_kpis.measurement_method: Auracelle WinterStorm2030 requirements register; post-game traceability audit
